title: Monday ambassadors program application is OPEN!

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
download (1)800×800 29.1 KB

Hey everyone! Jasmine here - Community Manager with the monday.com team where I support our regional communities and ambassadors program.

Are you a monday.com super fan? After a successful launch earlier this year, we are growing and we want YOU in our ambassador program!

Here’s what you can expect:

First access to new features
Special sessions with monday.com leaders and fellow ambassadors
Access to exclusive ambassador monday boards with ideas and resources

Oh, did we mention there’s swag?!

Welcome to the club, drop your name and details here: Ambassador application form

And feel free to tag me if you have any questions about the program!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: So excited for our group to grow!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sounds exciting. I’ve applied hopefully will make the cut!! Watch ths space…

image1275×733 40.3 KB

posts.author: Chloe_555 (Chloe Sorrell)
posts.cookedHtml: Application submitted!

posts.author: zuzanpink (Zuzana Pinkosova)
posts.cookedHtml: @JasHam Hi Jasmine, it is great to e-meet you. Thank you for the information regarding the Monday.com ambassador program. I would like to ask you if by completing the application I will automatically join the ambassador program or whether the application has to be approved / disapproved? Thank you very much.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
@zuzanpink Last year when I applied I had to wait and find out if I was accepted or not. I see from the addtional information it seems they will review all the applications at the end of the month!

“Each month we review the open applications and invite a limited number of ambassadors to join the program. Don’t worry, if you’re not invited this time, you’ll still be considered for the following month. We want to make sure we give each new ambassador plenty of our time and attention so for now, we’re keeping each monthly ambassador intake small. Every year we will re-evaluate the members of our ambassador program.”
